partial class M
{
    public static global::Order Map(global::OrderRequest src)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(src);
        var __dst = new global::Order(
            Id: src.Id,
            Items: global::System.Linq.Enumerable.ToList(global::System.Linq.Enumerable.Select(src.Items, static x => Map(x)))
        );
        return __dst;
    }
    public static global::OrderItem Map(global::OrderItemRequest src)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(src);
        var __dst = new global::OrderItem(
            Sku: src.Sku
        );
        return __dst;
    }
}
